sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports abdominal pain on both sides of the upper abdomen. He reports experiencing nausea and vomiting a couple of times this week. The patient reports abdominal pain. The patient reports experiencing nausea. The patient reports drinking too much coffee lately.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 118/72. Heart rate is 88 beats per minute. Temperature is 98.6°F. Neurological exam is unremarkable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms are most consistent with gastritis, potentially exacerbated by coffee consumption. He has a history of diabetes type two and asthma.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Recommend cutting back on spicy food. Increase metformin dosage to 500 milligrams twice per day. Continue flovent twice a day. Continue albuterol as needed. Schedule follow-up in one week to assess response to treatment.
